title: Tomato Performance Pack
description: A lightweight, FPS-optimized Vanilla+ survival modpack focused on performance and quality-of-life improvements.
body:
This modpack is based on my personal Minecraft gameplay experience.  
It focuses on **performance**, **quality-of-life improvements**, and a lightly enhanced **vanilla survival** experience without changing the core gameplay.

You can expect:
- Noticeably higher FPS thanks to performance-focused mods  
- Small but meaningful survival and UI improvements  
- A lightweight and stable modpack that stays close to vanilla  

---

If you like a **lightweight, stable, FPS-optimized** survival experience, this pack is for you.
